race.comment: BREECHES (3) saves her best form for this sprint journey with two wins and three seconds from seven attempts and will be high on confidence following that last-start victory here. Hard to knock mares in form and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. STORM CAPITAL (1) strips fitter second-up from the spell and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Expected to play a role in the finish. WILLINGALE (8) placed over this course and distance last time out, draws favourably in gate three and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. EXTRA FREE (10) doesn't win out of turn but has been thereabouts at the past couple and may trouble the judge again. PONTIUS (7) next best while fresh.
